text.title: Spring Boot Layered Architecture Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: build a layered OrderController + OrderService + OrderRepository.

example.context: Boot 3.4 monolith; existing Order @Entity; needs POST /orders that validates payload, persists, returns DTO.
example.walk: Step 1: Order entity exists with @OneToMany(LineItem) LAZY. Step 2: OrderRepository extends JpaRepository<Order, UUID>; @EntityGraph("order.items") on findById. Step 3: OrderService.create(OrderRequest) @Transactional — maps request → entity, repo.save, maps entity → OrderResponse. Step 4: record OrderRequest(@NotBlank String customer, @NotEmpty @Valid List<LineItemRequest> items). Step 5: OrderController @PostMapping returns ResponseEntity<OrderResponse>. Step 6: management.endpoints expose health/prometheus; @WebMvcTest validates 400 on missing customer.
example.output: Endpoint returns 201 + Location header; tx scoped to service.create; lazy associations resolved inside tx via @EntityGraph; Prometheus shows http.server.requests metric.
